caption:
SPF isn't seasonal. But this is your spring reminder to check yours.

With longer days returning to the PNW, UV exposure increases significantly—even on cloudy days. UVA rays (the ones that cause aging and pigmentation) penetrate clouds and windows.

Our sun protection non-negotiables:

• SPF 30+ broad-spectrum, every single day
• Reapply every 2 hours when outdoors
• Physical (mineral) sunscreens with zinc oxide for sensitive or post-treatment skin
• Don't forget ears, neck, chest, and hands
• Sunscreen is the LAST step in your skincare routine, BEFORE makeup

If you're investing in treatments like chemical peels, laser, or RF microneedling—sun protection isn't optional. It's how you protect your investment.

The best anti-aging product isn't in a luxury jar. It's the SPF you wear every day.

Ask us about our recommended medical-grade sunscreens at your next visit.
mediaDescription: Bright, sun-dappled flat lay of medical-grade sunscreen products alongside spring flowers. Educational overlay text with SPF tips. Clean, fresh aesthetic. Could also be a quick Reel demonstrating proper sunscreen application amount and technique.
